items.body_excerpt:
Ending trade week for Pacers on SI with a deep dive on Saddiq Bey. 

Title: Is Saddiq Bey the Pacers Missing Bench Piece?

If the Pacers can find the right trade package to acquire Bey from New Orleans, it would make perfect sense.
